place: Avenel CDP, New Jersey, New Jersey

facts.text: Avenel was founded in 1901 by Captain Demarest and named after his daughter, after the area once called Demarest on the Hill.
In 2019 the Avenel Performing Arts Center opened, turning a 13,500‑sq‑ft factory into a venue for theater, concerts, and community events.
The Avenel station offers a direct 45‑minute one‑seat train ride to New York Penn Station on NJ Transit's North Jersey Coast Line.
Bradco Supply, founded in 1966, made Avenel its flagship location as one of the country’s leading building‑product distributors.
Avenel hosts three public schools: Avenel Middle School, Avenel Street School #4&5, and Woodbine Avenue School #23.
The Avenel Fire Company #1 marked its centennial in 2013 with a parade and picnic celebrating a century of service.
